title: PO Requisition Output Row
description: Schema for a processed row written to PO_Processed_<timestamp>.xlsx. Extends the input schema with agent-populated fields.

Approval Tier.description: Tier assigned by the approval router based on Total Amount.

Approval Reason.description: Human-readable explanation of the tier assignment.

Status.description: Final processing status set by the agent.

Processed Timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the agent processed this row.

Agent Version.description: Version string of the agent that produced this row.

Validation Notes.description: Pipe-separated list of validation errors for this row. Empty string if clean.
examples: Total Amount ($64459.65) does not equal Qty × Unit Price ($60102.24) within ±$0.02
